intro: Cognition AI raised $1 billion at a $26 billion valuation for Devin, its AI coding agent, with revenue growing 13x to $492 million and customers including Goldman Sachs and Mercedes-Benz. Hotels are deploying AI to build guest profiles during booking, eliminating check-in lines and personalizing amenities like champagne for honeymooners. SK Hynix surpassed a $1 trillion market capitalization as AI-driven demand for memory chips lifts South Korean semiconductor stocks.

whitelist.title: Cognition raises $1B at $26B valuation for AI coding agent
whitelist.desc: Cognition AI raises $1 billion at a $26 billion valuation for Devin, its AI coding agent. Revenue grew 13x in a year to $492 million, with Goldman Sachs and Mercedes-Benz as customers.
